assertionResults.fullName: runAgentLoop routing — skipWorker=true makes exactly 2 SDK calls: router then presenter
assertionResults.title: makes exactly 2 SDK calls: router then presenter

assertionResults.fullName: runAgentLoop routing — skipWorker=true returns the FE tool call from the presenter
assertionResults.title: returns the FE tool call from the presenter

assertionResults.fullName: runAgentLoop routing — skipWorker=true returns a non-empty messages array
assertionResults.title: returns a non-empty messages array

assertionResults.fullName: runAgentLoop routing — skipWorker=false makes exactly 3 SDK calls: router, worker, presenter
assertionResults.title: makes exactly 3 SDK calls: router, worker, presenter

assertionResults.fullName: runAgentLoop routing — skipWorker=false returns the correct FE tool from presenter
assertionResults.title: returns the correct FE tool from presenter

assertionResults.fullName: runAgentLoop routing — skipWorker=false sends a message list ending in a synthetic user handoff to the presenter (Anthropic rejects assistant-ending input)
assertionResults.title: sends a message list ending in a synthetic user handoff to the presenter (Anthropic rejects assistant-ending input)

assertionResults.title: throws after 10 iterations with "exceeded maximum iterations"

assertionResults.fullName: runAgentLoop worker loop cap makes 11 total SDK calls when loop cap triggers (1 router + 10 worker)
assertionResults.title: makes 11 total SDK calls when loop cap triggers (1 router + 10 worker)

assertionResults.title: includes stub tool_result in messages passed to subsequent worker call

assertionResults.title: calls fetch with USDA API URL when API key is set
